evals.expected_output: Asks for the exported Pezi.app path and release summary if missing, writes release notes, publishes through publish-release.sh, and reports the published version/build and URLs.
Triggers the same release workflow from the pezi-release repo, asking for missing release inputs instead of guessing.
Asks the user which exported Pezi.app to publish and what changed in the release if that information is not already present.
